dashboard_filters.extra_filter: (customer_tag is {{CUST_TAG}} or customer_tag is empty or customer_tag is 'None')

group_filters.extra_filter: (name is 'interface')  and (customer_tag is '{{CUST_TAG}}' or customer_tag is empty or customer_tag is 'None')

widgets.title: Operational Status
widgets.extra_filter: (name is '{{NAME}}' and target_ip is '{{DEVICE}}') and (customer_tag is {{CUST_TAG}} or customer_tag is empty or customer_tag is 'None')

alert_markers.extra_filter: a_severity is 'CRITICAL' and a_en_metric_name contains 'oper_status' and (a_asset_ip_address is '{{DEVICE}}') and a_source_systemname  contains 'asm_snmp' and (customer_tag is {{CUST_TAG}} or customer_tag is empty or customer_tag is 'None')
